follow_ups.title: Execute act phase: implement runRuffCheck, runMypyCheck, and GREEN phase wiring
follow_ups.description: The primary deliverable of this epic was never implemented. All 3 tasks are queued. Run `datum act` to execute task-1 (runRuffCheck), task-2 (runMypyCheck), and task-3 (GREEN phase wiring) in dependency order. CORR-010 in the review report.
follow_ups.action: Run `datum act` against the existing lane-plan.json in docs/epics/datum/fail-fast-validation/

follow_ups.title: Fix Kotlin language detection broken by build.gradle.kts in java markers
follow_ups.description: detect.py:37 — `build.gradle.kts` is listed under java markers and iteration hits java first, so Kotlin repos are always detected as Java. Add a post-java guard that checks for build.gradle.kts and returns kotlin, mirroring the typescript-over-javascript guard.
follow_ups.action: Remove `build.gradle.kts` from java markers list, add Kotlin override guard after java match

follow_ups.title: Validate DATUM_PROJECT_DIR before os.chdir() to prevent path traversal
follow_ups.description: cli.py:40 — DATUM_PROJECT_DIR is used unvalidated in os.chdir(). Any process that sets this env var can redirect datum's working directory to an arbitrary path. Validate realpath starts within allowed workspace root.
follow_ups.action: Add os.path.realpath validation against allowed base prefix before os.chdir()

follow_ups.title: Convert priorFailures and batchLaneIds to Set to eliminate O(n×m) dependency filtering
follow_ups.description: datum-tdd-act-lane.ts:447,457 — Array.includes() used for membership tests in the dependency filtering loop. Convert both to Set for O(1) lookups. Two-line fix per site.
follow_ups.action: const priorFailuresSet = new Set(priorFailures); use priorFailuresSet.has(d). Same for batchLaneIds.

follow_ups.title: Wrap json.loads in datum init with try/except to handle malformed config.json
follow_ups.description: cli.py:185 — json.loads(config_path.read_text()) is unguarded. If .datum/config.json is malformed (e.g. partial write), datum init crashes with an unhandled JSONDecodeError instead of a user-friendly message.
follow_ups.action: Wrap in try/except json.JSONDecodeError: warn and overwrite with freshly detected config

follow_ups.title: Fix uv-vs-pip fallback condition in _detect_test_command
follow_ups.description: detect.py:153 — The condition falls back to `python -m pytest` when both uv.lock AND pyproject.toml are absent, but a project with pyproject.toml and no uv.lock (pip-based) incorrectly gets `uv run pytest`. Condition should key only on uv.lock presence.
follow_ups.action: Change condition to: if not (root / 'uv.lock').exists(): return 'python -m pytest -x -q'

follow_ups.title: Add null-guard on epicBranch before path interpolation in datum-go.ts
follow_ups.description: datum-go.ts:106 — epicBranch is derived from an agent() call. If the call returns null or malformed output, epicBranch is undefined/empty, producing docs/epics//lane-plan.json or docs/epics/undefined/lane-plan.json with no error surfaced.
follow_ups.action: After branch-detection agent call, guard: if (!epicBranch) fall back to .datum/lane-plan.json

follow_ups.title: Fix link.unlink() IsADirectoryError in _install_workflows
follow_ups.description: cli.py:140 — link.unlink() raises IsADirectoryError if a directory named like a workflow file exists in ~/.claude/workflows/. Add explicit is_dir() branch using shutil.rmtree() before unlink.

follow_ups.title: Fix lang variable shadowing in _detect_language os.walk fallback
follow_ups.description: detect.py:72 — loop variable `lang` shadows the outer `lang` set by the marker-check pass. Rename to `ext_lang` inside the os.walk block.
follow_ups.action: Rename loop variable from lang to ext_lang on lines 72+ in the os.walk fallback block

follow_ups.title: Sanitize branch name before interpolation into filesystem path pattern
follow_ups.description: cli.py:205 — branch name from ensure_feature_branch() is interpolated directly into config's epic_dir_pattern without sanitization. A branch containing '../..' could escape the repo root.
follow_ups.action: After computing epic_dir, assert Path(epic_dir).resolve() is a subdirectory of the project root

follow_ups.title: Fix TOCTOU race in _install_workflows() symlink replacement
follow_ups.description: cli.py:144 — Between link.unlink() and link.symlink_to(js) a concurrent process could insert a symlink to a sensitive file. Use atomic rename pattern with os.replace() to eliminate the window.
follow_ups.action: Write to a temp path, then os.replace() into the final destination atomically

follow_ups.title: Parse package.json as JSON in _detect_ts_test_framework instead of raw text match
follow_ups.description: detect.py:108 — `'jest' in content` matches package names like jest-circus or babel-jest in any string value, including comments. Parse as JSON and inspect dependencies/devDependencies keys.
follow_ups.action: json.loads(content), check 'jest' / 'vitest' as keys in merged deps+devDeps dict

follow_ups.title: Add unittest detection path to _detect_python_test_framework
follow_ups.description: detect.py:96 — Function always returns 'pytest' unconditionally. Projects using unittest exclusively with no pytest markers will get incorrect detection.
follow_ups.action: Check for import unittest / unittest.TestCase in test files; return 'unittest' if no pytest markers found

follow_ups.title: Guard config-reading agent call in datum-go.ts with !a.testCommand check
follow_ups.description: datum-go.ts:93 — READ_CONFIG_PROMPT called unconditionally on every datum go invocation. Mirror guard from datum-tdd-act.ts: skip if testCommand and language are already in args.
follow_ups.action: Wrap READ_CONFIG_PROMPT agent call with: if (!a.testCommand || !a.language)
